title: anthotroche pannosa
intro: Anthotroche pannosa, also known as New Zealand candle bush, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Anthotroche pannosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
